patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 4 with extreme Stage 1/2 disagree (MIA@WSH Δ=0.337, SF@MIL Δ=0.14) + confidence_downgrade fires correctly on both — demoting from pre-cap A-/B+ to B-. Archive (5/25–5/30) consistently shows these high-delta disagreements warrant cap enforcement, not qualitative override.

D-grade dual-signal-against (SP xERA against AND PQI against) on KC@CIN, TEX@STL, COL@LAA — three of today's nine games carry this pattern. Cumulative archive record ~55-60% directional failure; not high enough to OVERRIDE, but reinforces SKIP enforcement on all three.

Calibration_caution_18_25pp fires on KC@CIN (+19.48pp) and COL@LAA (+18.21pp), both coinciding with D-grade, extreme Stage 1/2 disagree, and market fair_prob well below 0.42. Archive shows this zone is calibrator hallucination territory — SKIP is authoritative.

C-grade GOLD without SP or PQI support (NYM@SEA: SP edge against, PQI against, negative edge) matches the 5/21 process failure pattern exactly (WSH@NYM C-grade GOLD loss as sole staked pick). DOWNGRADE is the indicated response per the 5/21 lesson.

HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge) fires on LAD@ARI (-8.22pp) and NYM@SEA (-1.84pp). Archive through 5/30 validates HARD CAP 1 at 80-85% precision — do not loosen regardless of directional wins on negative-edge picks.
